title: Nefco Finances Norwegian Hydrogen to Scale Up Production in the Nordics
content: Nefco has signed a EUR 7 million loan agreement with Norwegian Hydrogen AS to accelerate the expansion of green hydrogen production across the Nordic region. This financing will support the deployment of renewable hydrogen solutions in hard-to-abate sectors, including heavy transport, maritime, and industrial operations. By utilizing renewable electricity such as hydropower and wind, Norwegian Hydrogen aims to significantly cut COâ‚‚ emissions. The loan is part of a broader financing package and will specifically aid the development of key initiatives like the Rjukan liquid hydrogen project, which recently secured additional funding from the EU and Innovation Norway. Jens Berge, CEO of Norwegian Hydrogen, stated that the support is instrumental in scaling operations to enable zero-emission solutions. The projects supported by this funding are expected to prevent over 40,000 tonnes of COâ‚‚ emissions annually, aligning with Nordic climate goals and EU sustainability targets.
author: Analysts Account
